name: Chicken and Rice Dinner
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds To 3 lb broiler/fryer, chicken, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop fresh parsley.
2. Dredge chicken pieces in flour.
3. In a skillet, heat oil on medium and brown chicken on all sides.
4. Meanwhile, combine rice, poultry seasoning, salt, pepper, milk, and water.
5. Pour mixture into a greased 13x9x2 inches baking pan.
6. Top with chicken.
7. Cover tightly with foil.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 55 minutes or until rice and chicken are tender.
9. Sprinkle with parsley before serving.
Serves: 4
